false_positives.claim: The Trump administration did not work to free 5,000 Taliban prisoners.
Labour will not introduce a “retirement tax”.
The image does not authentically depict Sean "Diddy" Combs with Prince Harry and Kanye "Ye" West.
Donald Trump does not want to terminate the Affordable Care Act.
Murders this year have not spiked 27% in Philadelphia.
For younger people, seasonal flu is not “in many cases” a deadlier virus than COVID-19
COVID-19 has not killed more North Carolinians in a year than the flu has in 10 years.
The United States is not the only industrialized, modernized country that does not already have a paid family medical leave program in place.

COVID-19 vaccines cannot kill elderly people.

Former President Donald Trump did lose the 2020 election.
Reports show U.S. President-elect Donald Trump has no deal ready to buy Greenland.
